title: Fabric Advanced Shift
body:
# What It Does

This Mod Makes Sneaking More Advance for example when You Press Shift Two Times It Going To Toggle Shift And Stay In Sneaking Mode!

## Commands

*/delay* Will Change  delay between Every Shift

*/delay up* Makes Delay +50

*/delay Down* Makes Delay -50

*/delay Default* Makes Delay 350 Which is Default

*/tempdelay* Will Change  delay between Every Shift (For A Temporarily Time)

## Usage

Press The Shift Two Times

## Keybinds

Key "K" (Default Key You Can Change From Controls In Option) It Going To Toggle Speed Bridge Mode Which Disables Double Shift 

Key "I" Makes Delay 50 Less Than Before

Key "O" Makes Delay 50 More Before

## Config

Config File Is Located At %appdata%\\.minecraft\fabricadvancedshift.txt

Also, The Number In It Is The Delay

## Required 

Fabric API

## Thanks

1. EhsanND
2. FabricMC Discord Server
